transformation_logic: Count of all interaction rows (view+cart+purchase) grouped by user_id.
description: How engaged a user is overall, based on total site interactions.

transformation_logic: Count of all interaction rows grouped by product_id.
description: How much attention a product gets overall.

transformation_logic: Weighted sum of events per product (view=1, cart=2, purchase=3).
description: How in-demand a product is, weighted by purchase intent.

transformation_logic: Mean event weight per product (total_engagement_score / total_interactions).
description: Average purchase intent per interaction with a product.

transformation_logic: Custom mapping of REES46 category_code into FakeStoreAPI's four broader categories.
description: Which broad product category this item belongs to.

transformation_logic: Average FakeStoreAPI rating per matched category, with overall average as fallback for unmatched products.
description: Estimated product quality/popularity, borrowed from a similar external category.

transformation_logic: Count of users who interacted with both products in a pair, top 20 products only, self-pairs removed.
description: How similar two products are, based on shared customer interest.

transformation_logic: Min-max normalization of price to a 0-1 scale.
description: Product price, scaled for fair comparison across items.

transformation_logic: Min-max normalization of rating to a 0-1 scale.
description: Product rating, scaled for fair comparison across items.

transformation_logic: Mean event weight per product, using revised weights (view=1, cart=3, purchase=5) to give purchases more influence than the v1 definition (view=1, cart=2, purchase=3).
description: Average purchase intent per interaction with a product.
